summary: Elevated lock wait and scheduling churn suggest lock contention.
reasoning_basis: Derived from observations: lock_wait_pct, context_switches_per_sec, callgraph_samples, callgraph_samples
suggested_actions: Collect perf record stacks and look for futex or lock-owner hotspots.

summary: High context-switch or run-queue pressure suggests a scheduler issue.
reasoning_basis: Derived from observations: involuntary_context_switches, context_switches_per_sec, run_queue
suggested_actions: Inspect run queue pressure and context-switch behavior with mpstat or sched traces.
